Off Calendar Sep-14-2015 Continued To Dec-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for (executor) Michael Lieberman.

Ms. Rasch reported that she has filed the Inventory & Appraisal, that they are trying to get documents but the banks have purged the records and that she intends to close the estate by the end of the year. The status on filing an inventory & appraisal is off calendar, the status on filing a petition for final distribution was continued to December 7, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
